title: Traveler's Backpack ATM Upgrades
description: This mod adds backpacks to the game, like shulkerboxes, but can be upgraded to get more space, this is for those people that likes to travel with all his items
body:
### An Allthemodium addon for Traveler's Backpack

The mod it's now an addon for Traveler's Backpack, from Tiviacz1337.
You can now download this addon to get another upgrades for these backpacks.


The addon versions below 1.1 are incompatible with the original Traveler's Backpack mod
